primary_observation: Even under a strong no-path/source-empty authority prior, the model explicitly challenged the tool conclusion and reconstructed the same LoadJson -> SURL -> fixed-guard differential chain.
With weaker tool authority, the model again said the tool candidates were incomplete and recovered the same target-aligned source/path/guard explanation rather than changing its semantic conclusion.

When given an intentionally incomplete candidate list, the model explicitly named the missing source and fixed-guard nodes and repaired the differential explanation rather than obeying the faulty tool envelope.
